releaseNotes: Unified Library: View Shop Items, Notes, Drawings, and Challenges in one place!
New Toast Notification System: Replaced boring alerts with smooth, bubbly popups.
Improved Saving: Fixed issues with saving challenges and notes to the library.
Haptic Feedback: Added vibrations for a more premium feel when deleting items.
Bug Fixes: Resolved type errors and improved data persistence across the app.
